                apps/web/src/app/admin/tenants/create-tenant-dialog.tsx (123L)
                  — Add Tenant trigger. Form: name (required), slug (regex

                    invalidates platform.list + platform.metrics.

                  — Controlled (open/onClose). Form: name, timezone, currency,
